class.name: JiebaSegment
class.brief_description: Chinese word segmentation, part-of-speech tagging, keyword extraction, and user dictionary management powered by CppJieba.
class.description: [JiebaSegment] wraps CppJieba for use from Godot scripts. Call [method initialize] before using segmentation methods. The default dictionary directory is usually [code]res://addons/godot_jieba/dict[/code]. The extension can load [code].utf8[/code] dictionary files, [code].gbk[/code] dictionary files, and imported [JiebaUTF8] resources.

method.name: add_word
method.description: Adds a user word to the in-memory dictionary. Optionally assigns a part-of-speech tag. Returns [code]true[/code] if the word was inserted.

method.name: add_word_with_freq
method.description: Adds a user word with an explicit frequency and optional part-of-speech tag. [param freq] must be greater than zero.

method.name: cut
method.description: Segments [param text] using CppJieba's mixed mode. When [param use_hmm] is [code]true[/code], HMM is used for unknown words.

method.name: cut_all
method.description: Segments [param text] in full mode, returning all dictionary words found in the text.

method.name: cut_for_search
method.description: Segments [param text] for search indexing. This mode first uses mixed mode, then further splits longer words into shorter search tokens.

method.name: cut_hmm
method.description: Segments [param text] using only the HMM segmenter.

method.name: extract_keywords
method.description: Extracts up to [param top_n] keywords using TF-IDF. Returns an [Array] of [Dictionary] values. Each dictionary contains [code]word[/code] ([String]), [code]weight[/code] ([float]), and [code]offsets[/code] ([PackedInt64Array]).

method.name: find_word
method.description: Returns whether [param word] exists in the current dictionary trie.

method.name: get_dict_path
method.description: Returns the normalized dictionary directory used by the current initialized instance. Returns an empty string before successful initialization.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes CppJieba from [param dict_path]. If [param dict_path] is empty, common dictionary locations are searched automatically. Returns [code]true[/code] on success. The dictionary directory must provide the base files [code]jieba.dict[/code], [code]hmm_model[/code], [code]user.dict[/code], [code]idf[/code], and [code]stop_words[/code] with either [code].utf8[/code] or [code].gbk[/code] extensions.

method.name: is_initialized
method.description: Returns whether [method initialize] has completed successfully.

method.name: load_user_dict
method.description: Loads additional user dictionary entries from [param path]. The file can be UTF-8, GBK, or an imported [JiebaUTF8] resource.

method.name: lookup_tag
method.description: Returns the part-of-speech tag associated with [param word], or an empty string if no tag is known.

method.name: remove_word
method.description: Removes a user word from the in-memory dictionary. Optionally matches a specific part-of-speech tag. Returns [code]true[/code] if the word was removed.

method.name: tag
method.description: Tags [param text] and returns a [Dictionary] mapping words to part-of-speech tags. If the same word appears more than once, later entries overwrite earlier entries. Use [method tag_pairs] when order must be preserved.

method.name: tag_pairs
method.description: Tags [param text] and returns ordered [code]word/tag[/code] strings.
